title: Implement outcome tracking service to capture task success/failure/rejection with human feedback
context: Implementing Milestone 1 of agent learning system. Create OutcomeTracker service that automatically records task outcomes. See design doc at docs/agent-learning-system.md and detailed spec at docs/handoffs/learning-system-milestone-1.md (Task 2). This hooks into task completion flow in worker.py to capture: success/failure, human review feedback, error types, retry counts. Enables tracking what happened with each task so patterns can be extracted later. DEPENDS ON: Database schema handoff must complete first.
acceptance: OutcomeTracker service created at app/services/outcome_tracker.py with methods: record_outcome, record_success, record_failure, record_rejection. Integrated into worker.py to auto-record on task completion. Integrated into task review endpoint to capture human feedback when review_state changes. TaskOutcome records created for all completed tasks. Unit tests verify outcome recording. Integration test verifies end-to-end flow (task completes → outcome recorded → queryable).
